body:
## Rationale

**Priority:** 🟡 MEDIUM-HIGH — high-CTR drummer, breakthrough album, zero competitor coverage

Inferno has 12 GSC impressions / 8.33% CTR (position 7.4) — a high-signal extreme metal drummer. Current Behemoth coverage: 'The Satanist' (#1825 on hold), 'Evangelion' (shipped). 'Demigod' (2004) is the missing arc entry:

- Behemoth's commercial breakthrough — first album to chart in the US (Billboard Heatseekers)
- Defined the 'blackened death metal' sound Behemoth became known for worldwide
- Inferno's performance on 'Demigod' is widely cited as his definitive recording — blast beats at 240+ BPM
- Pearl Masters BRX kit + Paiste Signature cymbals era
- Target queries: 'inferno behemoth drum kit 2004', 'demigod behemoth drums', 'behemoth demigod drum setup'

## Dedup verification

- `demigod-drum-setup` — **absent** from `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` (grep confirmed)
- Not in open seo-proposals (full list checked through #2338)
- Arc context: Thelema.6 (2000) → Zos Kia Cultus (2002) → Demigod (2004) → The Apostasy (2007) → Evangelion (shipped) → The Satanist (#1825)

## Implementation

**File to add:** Entry in `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js`

```
slug: 'demigod-drum-setup'
drummer: 'Inferno'
drummerSlug: 'inferno'
band: 'Behemoth'
album: 'Demigod'
year: 2004
kit: Pearl Masters BRX (maple/birch shells), 22/16/13/10 standard metal configuration
cymbals: Paiste Signature Dark Energy series
snare: Pearl Free-Floating 14x6.5
pedals: Pearl Eliminator double pedal
sticks: Vic Firth 5B
```

Key facts to include:
- First Behemoth album recorded in Hertz Studio, Białystok (their home studio)
- Inferno's first album after switching to Pearl Masters BRX
- 240+ BPM blast beats — one of the fastest recorded at the time for a major-label release
- Album reached #16 on Billboard Heatseekers chart (Behemoth's first US chart entry)

**LLM companion:** `public/llms/articles/demigod-drum-setup.md`

## Verify

- [ ] `/articles/demigod-drum-setup` returns 200
- [ ] Page has Inferno + Behemoth + Demigod in title/meta
- [ ] FAQPage JSON-LD with 3+ Q&As
- [ ] `public/llms/articles/demigod-drum-setup.md` sitemapped
- [ ] Internal link from inferno drummer profile

## Done

New album article + LLM companion for Behemoth 'Demigod' (Inferno, 2004).
title: SEO: Behemoth 'Demigod' drum setup (Inferno, 2004 — Behemoth breakthrough album, fills Thelema.6→The Satanist arc gap)
